'''dhadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:numberlessly|numberlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:numberlessly|numberlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhadate|dhadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhadatesher|dhadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhadatesherĂ«m|dhadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhadatero|dhadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhadateshĂ«|dhadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhadateshĂ«m|dhadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhadatero|gokidhadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhadateshĂ«|gokidhadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhadateshĂ«m|gokidhadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhadankerom|godhadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhadankeshĂ«|godhadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhadankeshĂ«m|godhadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhadankeya|godhadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhadaterom|dhadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhadatemu|dhadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhadateya|dhadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhadaterom|gokidhadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhadatemu|gokidhadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhadateya|gokidhadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhadadate|dhadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhadadatesher|dhadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhadadatesherĂ«m|dhadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhadadatero|dhadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhadadateshĂ«|dhadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhadadateshĂ«m|dhadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhadadatero|gokidhadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhadadateshĂ«|gokidhadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhadadateshĂ«m|gokidhadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhadadankerom|godhadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhadadankeshĂ«|godhadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhadadankeshĂ«m|godhadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhadadankeya|godhadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhadadaterom|dhadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhadadatemu|dhadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhadadateya|dhadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhadadaterom|gokidhadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhadadatemu|gokidhadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhadadateya|gokidhadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠte|dhĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠtesher|dhĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠtero|dhĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠdĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠdĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠdĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠterom|dhĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠtemu|dhĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠdĂŠteya|dhĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠdĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafdafte|dhafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafdaftesher|dhafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafdaftesherĂ«m|dhafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafdaftero|dhafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafdafteshĂ«|dhafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafdafteshĂ«m|dhafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafdaftero|gokidhafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafdafteshĂ«|gokidhafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafdafteshĂ«m|gokidhafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafdafnkerom|godhafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafdafnkeshĂ«|godhafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafdafnkeshĂ«m|godhafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafdafnkeya|godhafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafdafterom|dhafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafdaftemu|dhafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafdafteya|dhafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafdafterom|gokidhafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafdaftemu|gokidhafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafdafteya|gokidhafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
